review_title: Jile is your go-to agile project planning, and management SaaS solution
description: Jile has helped me gain a 360-degree view of entire project operations. I was able to achieve better collaboration with my team for making each of our project a success with Jile.
author: Ipsita R.
pros: The best part about Jile is that it's easily navigable. I was able to integrate Jile with our existing project management tools to make our project delivery and daily operations streamlines, smooth and efficient.
cons: At the moment, Jile is my go-to software for managing my project pipeline. While Jile helps me plan and execute projects effectively, the reporting features can be made a bit more customised as per differing business needs.

author: Mohammed F.
pros: It takes less time to learn and very flexible and reliable
cons: I think currently no , if i were a PM in JILE then i may recommend colour
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Lyn R.
pros: I like how the team can monitor the status of their tasks and visualize them using Kanban.
cons: Reports creation is not that user friendly.

author: Leonardo C.
pros: Project management very easy to manage & track the task
cons: The feature is very nice for collaboration task like UAT testing acceptance

description: Overall experience is good. I would recommend to anyone.
author: Anirban D.
pros: Usage is the best part - it is not complicated.
cons: Sometimes setting up people and providing them access - the route is a bit difficult

author: Hari K.
pros: Project management was easy with Scrum and Kanban frameworks. We can easily onboard users to our workspace and collaborate the work with our team members. Unlimited document storage.
cons: Collaboration with other external tools was so low. Push notifications in the workspace wasn't working smartly.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Ganesh K.
pros: Jile provides necessary agility for teams and programs which tends to scale up.
cons: Collaboration with external tools and different templates for reporting are missing. There are challenges during initial steps, needs improvement in UX/UI level and proper guide inside the product.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
